untranslatable_reason: Hilbert Transform with alpha = 0.07 is not available in the allowed indicators list. The signal requires a specialized cyclic analysis tool that detects peaks and valleys at maximum/minimum cycle points. This cannot be expressed using only the provided indicators (moving averages, RSI, ATR, Bollinger Bands, MACD, ADX, Stochastic, Donchian, Pivots, volume, or bar properties). The cyclic frequency characteristics (approximately one peak/valley yearly, with valley timing in late summer/early fall) also cannot be captured without custom Hilbert Transform implementation.
translation_notes: Signal is fundamentally untranslatable without Hilbert Transform indicator support. The mean reversion logic would apply long entries at detected valleys and short entries at detected peaks within RANGING regimes, with exits at opposite cycle extremes. Estimated hold period of ~180 days based on annual cycle frequency described in parameters.
